speaker: buyer

args.message: Hello there! This Camry looks lovely in the pictures. How long have you had it, and has it been a good car for you?

text: Hello there! This Camry looks lovely in the pictures. How long have you had it, and has it been a good car for you?

speaker: seller

args.message: This Camry has been on our lot for about two weeks now, but it came to us from a private owner who had it for several years. They traded it in because they needed something bigger for their growing family. Honestly, these Camrys are just workhorses; this one's no exception. You really can't go wrong with a Toyota!

text: This Camry has been on our lot for about two weeks now, but it came to us from a private owner who had it for several years. They traded it in because they needed something bigger for their growing family. Honestly, these Camrys are just workhorses; this one's no exception. You really can't go wrong with a Toyota!

speaker: buyer

args.message: That's wonderful to hear! It sounds like a really reliable car. Has it had any bumps or scrapes in its life, or has it been pretty smooth sailing for the previous owner?

text: That's wonderful to hear! It sounds like a really reliable car. Has it had any bumps or scrapes in its life, or has it been pretty smooth sailing for the previous owner?

speaker: seller

args.message: Smooth sailing is right! This Camry is in excellent condition. We always get our cars detailed and inspected thoroughly before putting them on the lot, and this one checked out with flying colors. No major dings or dents to speak of, just the usual minor wear and tear you'd expect from a car of this age, nothing that affects its performance one bit.

speaker: seller

args.message: So, what do you think? Ready to take it for a spin? I know you know, to really feel that smooth ride I mentioned?

text: So, what do you think? Ready to take it for a spin? I know you know, to really feel that smooth ride I mentioned?

speaker: buyer

args.message: Oh, that sounds lovely, a test drive! I was just looking at the inspection report you had done, and I noticed it mentioned a little dent on the back passenger side. Is that something that happened recently, or did you already take care of that for me?

text: Oh, that sounds lovely, a test drive! I was just looking at the inspection report you had done, and I noticed it mentioned a little dent on the back passenger side. Is that something that happened recently, or did you already take care of that for me?

speaker: seller

args.message: Ah, that little thing? Yes, that must have happened just before it came to us. Barely noticeable, honestly. We actually had our guys buff it out and touch it up – you can hardly see it unless you're practically nose-to-the-paint in direct sunlight. It's purely cosmetic, my friend, doesn't affect the drive one bit. This car drives like a dream, well, like a Camry!

args.message: That's wonderful to hear about the transmission, it gives me a lot of peace of mind! Just out of curiosity, was this Camry mostly used as a personal car, or did it perhaps have a different kind of life before, like being part of a company fleet?

text: That's wonderful to hear about the transmission, it gives me a lot of peace of mind! Just out of curiosity, was this Camry mostly used as a personal car, or did it perhaps have a different kind of life before, like being part of a company fleet?

speaker: seller

args.message: Oh, this has been a personal car its whole life. A lovely local owner who babied it. You can tell by how well it's held up, right? Definitely not a fleet vehicle. This is the kind of car you buy for reliability and comfort, and that's exactly what you get here.
